_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of vulnerabilities of various encryption systems.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of LLM-specific security vulnerabilities, including the OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications (prompt injection, insecure output handling, training data poisoning, model theft, excessive agency).
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.525), SP-K-001 (SP, cosine: 0.495).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.421). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, vulnerabilities]. DCWF-only terms [encryption, systems, various] vs WIDAI-only terms [10, agency, applications, data, excessive, handling] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.914, R=0.834). P exceeds R by 0.080 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:62.5%, C:37.5%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of vulnerabilities of various encryption systems." vs "Knowledge of LLM-specific security vulnerabilities, including the OWASP Top 10 f" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.526 > STS 0.421 (gap +0.106). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, vulnerabilities] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, vulnerabilities]. DCWF-only: [encryption, systems, various]. WIDAI-only: [10, agency, applications, data, excessive, handling].
